programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lequen is suing his girlfriend, Sheron, in the amount of $2,720 for unpaid lap dance services and video game purchases her son made on his credit card without his consent!

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: Kim prepares for the birth of her third child, Khloe struggles to choose a godparent for her baby, and Kourtney makes her dancing debut in a flash mob.

programme.title: Celebrity Family Feud
programme.desc: Actor Simu Liu goes head-to-head against figure skater Nathan Chen and his family; singer Monica faces off against So So Def founder Jermaine Dupri.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Lake Elsinore, CA, buyers clash as some strike gold and others struggle. Dave stirs trouble despite a good mood, Rene and Jarrod battle for top units, and Ivy works an unfamiliar area.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Santa Ana, Dave Hester uses home-field advantage to rattle rivals. Jarrod and Brandi struggle, Rene bids hard, and Ivy crashes the Orange County auction against new competition.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Linda does not allow her family into her home for years until a medical emergency exposes the secret she has been hiding.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Daniel has come off his motorbike. His mum Diana hurries to hospital to be by his side.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: A broken oven forces Chef Ben to attempt a seven-course dinner under extreme pressure. Cracks spread across the boat as Mike goes missing when he's needed most.

programme.title: Lady Of The Dune
programme.desc: A detective becomes obsessed, and a son searches for answers.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The truth behind the deaths of a couple remains dormant until 15 years later, when a new police task force exposes a killer that let money remove their sense of consequence.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: When police discover a body wrapped in duct tape on church grounds in the posh neighborhood of Buckhead, Atlanta detectives must untangle a web of romance.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Lake Elsinore, CA, buyers clash as some strike gold and others struggle. Dave stirs trouble despite a good mood, Rene and Jarrod battle for top units, and Ivy works an unfamiliar area.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Santa Ana, Dave Hester uses home-field advantage to rattle rivals. Jarrod and Brandi struggle, Rene bids hard, and Ivy crashes the Orange County auction against new competition.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Linda does not allow her family into her home for years until a medical emergency exposes the secret she has been hiding.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Garcelle is honored for her work with a local charity. The ladies feel mom-shamed when Denise shows up to Kyle's kid-friendly barbecue without her kids.

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: After rough dockings, Capt. Sandy questions her bosun about safety concerns and trust. Romance and tension mix between a stew and a deckhand while another deckhand ends a relationship.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Daniel has come off his motorbike. His mum Diana hurries to hospital to be by his side.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Nesha is suing her baby daddy, Rae, in the amount of $1,800. She says that Rae borrowed her car for the day and got into an accident while headed to drop off their children to daycare!

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: Kourtney lashes out at her mum over issues from the past, Khloe is devastated by an unexpected loss, and Kylie welcomes her first baby.

programme.title: Celebrity Family Feud
programme.desc: NFL Players Association mums and their player sons compete; Joe Tessitore and Rob Riggle go up against Kimberly Williams-Paisley and her family.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hit Ivy's home turf in Lancaster, CA. Mary teams up with an unlikely ally, Jarrod and Brandi heat up the competition, and Rene steps far outside his comfort zone to prove himself.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In North Hollywood, buyers chase big dreams. Mary gains an edge with a secret weapon, Dave gambles despite hating Hollywood, Jarrod and Brandi aim high, and Rene risks it all.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Linda does not allow her family into her home for years until a medical emergency exposes the secret she has been hiding.

programme.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programme.desc: 76-year-old Basil is rushed to A&E with a deep cut to his head after falling down some stairs at home.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Kim plans a girls' night that descends into madness. Chris helps Audrey move into her new apartment. Jason attempts to reconnect with Angelica after an awkward situation.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: Just months before his retirement, a missing trucker's body is found in a remote creek. As detectives run out of leads, a seemingly minute detail breathes new life into the investigation.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The disappearance of an elderly New York socialite is the catalyst for the nationwide investigation into an unusual con duo, who treasure a luxurious way of life above all.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: When an Atlanta-area horse trainer abruptly vanishes from his ranch, police search for the missing father-to-be.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: NY
programme.desc: Fredrik and Ryan's relationship is tested by a provocative request and business complications. S4 Ep5.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: NY
programme.desc: Fredrik's reputation is tested when developers threaten to pull out of premium finishes they promised. S4 Ep6.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Having ten thousand or more articles of clothing and an entire house filled with online purchases, will the cleanup experts even be able to help Eric arrange a manageable life?

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Tristan's shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A retired nurse makes extra money selling things that other people have discarded, but is fined $3000 a week because her three Florida homes are overflowing with her stuff.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium
programme.desc: The larger-than-life Kenya Moore has an emotional reading when Tyler connects with her endeared grandmother, prompting the Real Housewives of Atlanta star to share raw memories of her childhood.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Sergeant Trevor Poulton witnesses the biggest burnout of his career when a car suddenly lays down rubber right in front of him.
